results.verification_command: bash -c 'set -e; missing=0; for f in $(git ls-files ".harness/contracts/sprint-*.md"); do n=$(basename "$f" .md); if [ "$n" = "sprint-fx" ] || [ "$n" = "sprint-fy" ]; then continue; fi; t=".harness/contracts/$n.tasks.json"; if [ "$n" \!= "sprint-01" ] && [ "$n" \!= "sprint-02" ] && [ "$n" \!= "sprint-03" ] && [ "$n" \!= "sprint-04" ] && [ "$n" \!= "sprint-05" ]; then if [ ! -f "$t" ]; then echo "MISSING $t"; missing=1; fi; fi; done; exit $missing'

bash -c 'set -e; sprints=$(git ls-files ".harness/contracts/sprint-*.md" ".harness/evals/sprint-*.md" | grep -v "sprint-12"); if [ -z "$sprints" ]; then echo "no historical artifacts found"; exit 1; fi; diff_out=$(git diff HEAD -- $sprints); if [ -n "$diff_out" ]; then echo "HISTORICAL ARTIFACTS MODIFIED:"; echo "$diff_out" | head -50; exit 1; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'set -e; failed=0; for f in $(git ls-files ".harness/evals/sprint-*-r*.md"); do if grep -q "^## Transcript Trailer" "$f"; then if ! python tests/audit-verified-via-command.py "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "FABRICATION DETECTED: $f"; failed=1; fi; fi; done; exit $failed'
